slideOver.lostSubtitle: You used every slide allowed for this round.
slideOver.lostHint: Use your free retry, or restart from the last checkpoint — higher rounds have tighter move limits.
slideOver.lostHintAfterFree: Your free retry is used up. Watch a short ad for one more try on this round, or restart from your last checkpoint.
slideOver.lostHintFinal: No more retries this round — restart from checkpoint or head home.
slideOver.checkpointStatusNone: First checkpoint after you finish round {{every}}.

tipsSlide.title: Endless run
tipsSlide.body: Solve 3×3 puzzles one after another. Each round gets a bit stricter on time and move budget.

tipsSlide.title: Checkpoints
tipsSlide.body: Every 5 rounds you complete, a checkpoint is saved. If you still fail after your free retry (and any ad retry), you restart from the round right after your last checkpoint (or from round 1 if none yet).

tipsSlide.title: Free retry
tipsSlide.body: The first time you fail a puzzle in a round, you can retry once with a fresh shuffle. You may get one extra try by watching a short ad before using a checkpoint.
